title: Rod Hayslett
compiled_truth: Rod Hayslett is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-05-06), Rod Hayslett sent 900 and received 1725 emails, totalling 2625 interactions. Top correspondents: [Tracy Geaccone](people/tracy-geaccone) (269), [James Saunders](people/james-saunders) (177), [A  Howard](people/a-howard) (119), [Kathy Campos](people/kathy-campos) (72), [Jerry Peters](people/jerry-peters) (67). Mailbox folders observed: _sent_mail, contacts, deleted_items, discussion_threads, eott, gpg.
